Class Budget

java.lang.Object
com.finvision.model.Budget
public class Budget extends Object
MongoDB document representing a monthly budget plan in Finvision.

Captures a user's projected income (primary + other) and planned expenses split into fixed categories (rent, utilities, insurance, groceries, subscriptions) and user-defined variable categories.

Each document is scoped to a single user and calendar month. Stored in the budgets collection.
